description_long: This object is a vertical roadside speed limit sign featuring a rectangular white face with a bold red circle and the number '100' in black, indicating a speed limit of 100 kilometers per hour. The sign face is mounted atop a long, slender, cylindrical pole, which appears to be made of metal and is painted a dark color. The sign face is smooth and reflective, designed for high visibility in various lighting conditions. The pole is simple and unadorned, with no additional fixtures or embellishments. The rear of the sign is plain, showing only the back of the metal plate and the supporting pole. This type of sign is commonly found along highways or major urban roads to regulate vehicle speed.
description: A white rectangular speed limit sign with a red circle and '100' in black, mounted on a tall, dark metal pole. The sign is designed for roadside placement and high visibility.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain back of the sign plate and the full length of the dark cylindrical pole.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the sign plate and the straight, unadorned pole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white sign face with a red circle and '100' in black, clearly indicating the speed limit.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile of the sign and pole.
